# stripe_treasury_outbound_transfer (Action)

Use [OutboundTransfers](https://docs.stripe.com/docs/treasury/moving-money/financial-accounts/out-of/outbound-transfers) to transfer funds from a [FinancialAccount](https://api.stripe.com#financial_accounts) to a PaymentMethod belonging to the same entity. To send funds to a different party, use [OutboundPayments](https://api.stripe.com#outbound_payments) instead. You can send funds over ACH rails or through a domestic wire transfer to a user's own external bank account.

Simulate OutboundTransfer state changes with the `/v1/test_helpers/treasury/outbound_transfers` endpoints. These methods can only be called on test mode objects.

Related guide: [Moving money with Treasury using OutboundTransfer objects](https://docs.stripe.com/docs/treasury/moving-money/financial-accounts/out-of/outbound-transfers)



<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `amount` (Number) Amount (in cents) transferred.
- `currency` (String) Three-letter [ISO currency code](https://www.iso.org/iso-4217-currency-codes.html), in lowercase. Must be a [supported currency](https://stripe.com/docs/currencies).
- `financial_account` (String) The FinancialAccount that funds were pulled from.

### Optional

- `description` (String) An arbitrary string attached to the object. Often useful for displaying to users.
- `destination_payment_method` (String) The PaymentMethod used as the payment instrument for an OutboundTransfer.
- `destination_payment_method_data` (Attributes) Hash used to generate the PaymentMethod to be used for this OutboundTransfer. Exclusive with `destination_payment_method`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--destination_payment_method_data))
- `destination_payment_method_options` (Attributes) Hash describing payment method configuration details. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--destination_payment_method_options))
- `metadata` (Map of String) Set of [key-value pairs](https://docs.stripe.com/api/metadata) that you can attach to an object. This can be useful for storing additional information about the object in a structured format.
- `statement_descriptor` (String) Information about the OutboundTransfer to be sent to the recipient account.

<a id="nestedatt--destination_payment_method_data"></a>
### Nested Schema for `destination_payment_method_data`

Required:

- `type` (String) The type of the destination.

Optional:

- `financial_account` (String) Required if type is set to `financial_account`. The FinancialAccount ID to send funds to.


<a id="nestedatt--destination_payment_method_options"></a>
### Nested Schema for `destination_payment_method_options`

Optional:

- `us_bank_account` (Attributes) Optional fields for `us_bank_account`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--destination_payment_method_options--us_bank_account))

<a id="nestedatt--destination_payment_method_options--us_bank_account"></a>
### Nested Schema for `destination_payment_method_options.us_bank_account`

Optional:

- `network` (String) Specifies the network rails to be used. If not set, will default to the PaymentMethod's preferred network. See the [docs](https://docs.stripe.com/treasury/money-movement/timelines) to learn more about money movement timelines for each network type.
